headline: Teledyne's Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, '26 EPS View Raised

headline: $3.85 Bn Unmanned Surface Vehicles Market Global Forecast to 2036: Maritime Security Demand, Autonomous Survey Expansion and Advanced Surveillance Technologies Bolster Growth
summary: The global unmanned surface vehicles (USV) market is set to soar, reaching approximately USD 3.85 billion by 2036, growing at a CAGR of 11.8% from USD 1.22 billion in 2026. An in-depth report highlights trends, market sizes, and forecasts for five key regions. Key growth drivers include heightened maritime security, advanced autonomous capabilities, and economic surveillance solutions. North America leads due to significant naval investments, with Asia-Pacific poised for the fastest growth. The

headline: Teledyne lifts annual profit forecast, beats quarterly estimates
summary: Teledyne Technologies on Wednesday raised its profit forecast for full-year 2026, as ‌the sensing systems maker continues to benefit ‌from robust demand across its digital imaging, instrumentation, and aerospace ​and defense segments. Teledyne continues to benefit from elevated demand for defense and surveillance equipment amid heightened geopolitical tensions, and the company noted further boost to ‌its top-line from ⁠revenue added from recent acquisitions. "Organic growth was strongest in our Digital Imaging segment, ⁠where infrared detectors and systems for space, airborne, marine and land applications, as well as complete ​unmanned aerial ​systems contributed significantly," said ​CEO Ro...

headline: Teledyne’s (NYSE:TDY) Q1 CY2026 Sales Top Estimates
summary: Digital imaging and instrumentation provider Teledyne (NYSE:TDY) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 7.6% year on year to $1.56 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $5.80 per share was 6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
